nodes.label: Shared helpers for driftwm dashboard widgets.
nodes.norm_label: shared helpers for driftwm dashboard widgets.

nodes.label: Render HH:MM as two rows of block characters.
nodes.norm_label: render hh:mm as two rows of block characters.

nodes.label: Render a sparkline from recent values (0-100 absolute scale).
nodes.norm_label: render a sparkline from recent values (0-100 absolute scale).

nodes.label: Render a thin horizontal progress bar.
nodes.norm_label: render a thin horizontal progress bar.

nodes.label: Tracks CPU usage between calls via /proc/stat deltas.
nodes.norm_label: tracks cpu usage between calls via /proc/stat deltas.

nodes.label: CPU usage since last call (delta from /proc/stat).
nodes.norm_label: cpu usage since last call (delta from /proc/stat).

nodes.label: Returns (percent, status, time_remaining) or None. Uses sysfs (no subprocess).
nodes.norm_label: returns (percent, status, time_remaining) or none. uses sysfs (no subprocess).

nodes.label: Get unread notification count from swaync.
nodes.norm_label: get unread notification count from swaync.

nodes.label: IP geolocation via ip-api.com. Cached for the session.
nodes.norm_label: ip geolocation via ip-api.com. cached for the session.

nodes.label: Fetch weather from Open-Meteo. Returns dict or None on failure.
nodes.norm_label: fetch weather from open-meteo. returns dict or none on failure.

nodes.label: Returns the active tuned profile name, e.g. 'balanced'.
nodes.norm_label: returns the active tuned profile name, e.g. 'balanced'.

nodes.label: Cycle to the next tuned profile in TUNED_PROFILES.
nodes.norm_label: cycle to the next tuned profile in tuned_profiles.

nodes.label: Returns screen brightness percent or None. Uses sysfs (no subprocess).
nodes.norm_label: returns screen brightness percent or none. uses sysfs (no subprocess).

nodes.label: Query battery percentage for a BT device via bluetoothctl info.
nodes.norm_label: query battery percentage for a bt device via bluetoothctl info.

nodes.label: Returns formatted bluetooth status string with icon, or None.
nodes.norm_label: returns formatted bluetooth status string with icon, or none.

nodes.label: Wait up to timeout seconds for a mouse press. Returns (x, y) 1-based or None.
nodes.norm_label: wait up to timeout seconds for a mouse press. returns (x, y) 1-based or none.

nodes.label: Read keyboard layout from driftwm config.
nodes.norm_label: read keyboard layout from driftwm config.

nodes.label: Convert 1-based terminal row to item index, or None if outside.
nodes.norm_label: convert 1-based terminal row to item index, or none if outside.

nodes.label: Read keyboard or mouse input. Returns (event_type, item_index_or_None).
nodes.norm_label: read keyboard or mouse input. returns (event_type, item_index_or_none).

nodes.label: Spawn a shell command fully detached from the terminal.
nodes.norm_label: spawn a shell command fully detached from the terminal.

nodes.label: Return cached slow-poll data, refreshing every SLOW_POLL_INTERVAL seconds.
nodes.norm_label: return cached slow-poll data, refreshing every slow_poll_interval seconds.

nodes.label: Convert terminal x coordinate to 0-100 percentage, or None if outside bar.
nodes.norm_label: convert terminal x coordinate to 0-100 percentage, or none if outside bar.
